# tests/customer-experience/security/test_security.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:12Z

## Purpose
Tier 11-12 — Security tests for customer-experience.

Per global §64.32 + §64.42: covers OWASP Top 10, AI-specific (prompt
injection / model theft / data poisoning), and infrastructure (DDoS).

⚠ §42 gated: pen + DDoS testing only in authorized envs.

Recommended OSS:
  - OWASP ZAP (DAST)
  - Garak (prompt injection / hallucination)
  - Semgrep (SAST)
  - Trivy (container scan)
  - Kubescape (K8s)

## Imports
- from `_` import pytest

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `test_sql_injection_payload_sample()`: Smoke: SQL-injection payload library not empty.
- `test_prompt_injection_payload_sample()`: Smoke: prompt-injection payload library not empty.
- `test_customer_experience_owasp_zap_scan()`: REPLACE — invoke OWASP ZAP CLI against customer-experience surface (auth env only).
- `test_customer_experience_garak_prompt_injection()`: REPLACE — Garak adversarial prompt injection sweep.

- Return values from functions above
